attributes.action: Reduce the cost of living by at least 15% through caps on essential expenses
attributes.additional_details: Too many people suffer trying to make ends meet, children starve, parents starve to make ends meet, pay just for a roof over their head. Adults finishing university struggle to keep afoot as they are in constant debt from unreasonablely High interest on student debt and people often live with parents, house share after 30, after children, even after a stable job, but due to high house/ mortgage and even just food prices people struggle and are unable to live independently.
attributes.background: To cap essential expenses like gas and electric, water, mortgages, rent and student loans. Allowing more people to move out before 30, people's student loans will actually be paid off as right now, they will never be fully paid for, This also allows more people to have a good standard of living.

rejection.details:
We are not clear what specific action you are seeking from the UK Government or Parliament. You may wish to sign one of these petitions which calls for similar action:
'Align Plan 2 student loan interest rates with Plan 5 (RPI only).'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759969
'Reduce Interest on Student Loans & Cap Total Debt at One Year’s Average Salary'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760412
'Investigate food costs & introduce regulation & a cap on essential food prices'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/747332
'Cap retail oil and gas prices'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764109
